title: Faithful-First Reasoning, Planning, and Acting for Multimodal LLMs
what_happened: arXiv:2511.08409v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) frequently suffer from unfaithfulness, generating reasoning chains that drift from visual evidence or contradict final predictions. We propose Faithful-First Reasoning, Planning, and Acting (RPA) framework in which FaithEvi provides step-wise and chain-leve
primary_risk: Risk of overfitting conclusions to narrow benchmarks.
primary_opportunity: Selective adoption in niche use cases with clear ROI.
technical_angle: Adds empirical validation to approaches already used in production AI stacks.

title: LLMs crush coding and math but choke on casual questions, and that's not a contradiction
what_happened: AI models can restructure entire codebases in hours but stumble over simple everyday questions. That's not a contradiction, and it might reveal a fundamental limit of today's language models. The article LLMs crush coding and math but choke on casual questions, and that's not a contradiction appeared first on The Decoder.
primary_risk: Debugging complexity and cascading failures in agentic systems.
primary_opportunity: End-to-end automation of complex cognitive workflows.
technical_angle: Agent orchestration is emerging as a new software abstraction layer.

title: Anthropic’s Mythos Will Force a Cybersecurity Reckoning—Just Not the One You Think
what_happened: The new AI model is being heralded—and feared—as a hacker’s superweapon. Experts say its arrival is a wake-up call for developers who have long made security an afterthought.
primary_risk: Unclear production readiness despite promising early results.
primary_opportunity: Foundation for future optimization rather than immediate disruption.
technical_angle: Reinforces known techniques with modest refinements to existing methods.

title: Meta’s New AI Asked for My Raw Health Data—and Gave Me Terrible Advice
what_happened: Meta’s Muse Spark model offers to analyze users’ health data, including lab results. Beyond the obvious privacy risks, it’s not a capable stand-in for a real doctor.
primary_risk: Regulatory exposure and erosion of public trust due to opaque data practices.
primary_opportunity: Differentiation through auditable, privacy-preserving AI pipelines.
technical_angle: Trust, not model size, is becoming a core technical constraint in AI systems.

title: Deepmind CEO Hassabis says AGI will hit like ten industrial revolutions compressed into a single decade
what_happened: Deepmind CEO Demis Hassabis thinks AGI could arrive within five years and compares its impact to ten times the industrial revolution, unfolding in a tenth of the time. Yet he warns that AI is overhyped right now and still vastly underestimated over the next decade. The article Deepmind CEO Hassabis says AGI will hit like ten industrial revolutions
primary_risk: Risk of overfitting conclusions to narrow benchmarks.
primary_opportunity: Selective adoption in niche use cases with clear ROI.
technical_angle: Reinforces known techniques with modest refinements to existing methods.
